chapter_title.ar: باب صِفَةِ الْغُسْلِ وَ الْوُضُوءِ قَبْلَهُ وَ بَعْدَهُ وَ الرَّجُلِ يَغْتَسِلُ فِي مَكَانٍ غَيْرِ طَيِّبٍ وَ مَا يُقَالُ عِنْدَ الْغُسْلِ وَ تَحْوِيلِ الْخَاتَمِ عِنْدَ الْغُسْلِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 29 – Description of the washing, and the Ablution (Wudhu) before it and after it, and the man washing in a place other than good, and what is to be said during the washing, and turning of the ring during the washing

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/136)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/136)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يَغْتَسِلُ مِنَ الْجَنَابَةِ أَ يَغْسِلُ رِجْلَيْهِ بَعْدَ الْغُسْلِ فَقَالَ إِنْ كَانَ يَغْتَسِلُ فِي مَكَانٍ يَسِيلُ الْمَاءُ عَلَى رِجْلَيْهِ بَعْدَ الْغُسْلِ فَلَا عَلَيْهِ أَنْ لَا يَغْسِلَهُمَا وَ إِنْ كَانَ يَغْتَسِلُ فِي مَكَانٍ يَسْتَنْقِعُ رِجْلَاهُ فِي الْمَاءِ فَلْيَغْسِلْهُمَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Hammad, from Bakr Bin Karb who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the man washing from the sexual impurity, ‘Can he wash his legs before the washing?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If he was washing in a place where the water flows upon his feet after the washing, so it would not be upon him that he washes them both; and if it was such that he is washing in a place where his feet are in stagnant water, so let him wash both of them’.
en.sarwar: 10. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Husayn from Hammad from Bakr ibn Karib who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who takes Ghusl (bath) because of sexual relation; must he wash his feet after Ghusl (bath)? He (the Imam) said, ‘It is not necessary for him to wash if he stands during taking Ghusl (bath) at such a place where water flows over his feet, but he must wash them if, while taking Ghusl (bath) he stands in a place where his feet are in stagnant water.’”
